trait.name: Description
trait.text:
The Kuo-Toa are a twisted, aquatic people warped by centuries of madness and exposure to their own insecurities. Once a peaceful coastal species, they claim to be the remnants of a powerful undersea empire that was betrayed and destroyed by surface-dwelling species. While no records of such an empire exist outside Kuo-Toa myths, they fiercely cling to this belief. Whether rooted in truth or delusion, this paranoia fuels their deep mistrust of land-dwellers. Many Kuo-Toa view outsiders as agents of the surface conspiracy and are quick to react with hostility or suspicion. Despite their fractured minds, Kuo-Toa possess a unique awareness of otherworldly entities, and some are even known to create false deities through sheer belief.
Source: Sewage Orc

trait.name: Amphibious
trait.text: You can breathe both air and water.

trait.name: Otherworldly Perception
trait.text: As a bonus action, you can heighten your awareness to gain truesight out to a range of 30 feet for 1 minute. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

trait.name: Slippery
trait.text: You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or remove the Grappled condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Anathema
trait.text: The light of the sun disorients you. While in direct sunlight, you cannot add your Dexterity modifier to your Armor Class (if applicable).

trait.name: Net Master
trait.text:
You have learned to wield nets with deadly precision.
• When you make an attack with a Net, you add your Strength modifier as well as your Dexterity modifier when calculating the Dexterity saving throw DC to avoid being restrained. • The escape DC for a Net you throw is equal to 10 + your Strength modifier.

trait.name: Spurious Blessing
trait.text: You know the Sacred Flame cantrip. However, when you cast it, the spell deals cold damage instead of radiant. You always have this cantrip prepared. When you cast a spell using this trait, you choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability (choose the ability when you create your Kuo-Toa).
